config.html_body:
AC Power Simulator

Generates realistic AC power consumption data into the power_consumption table. Simulates pulldown, cycling, and off states with configurable parameters.

32
24
7
100%
-
config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; } #app { max-width: 800px; } .desc { font-size: 13px; color: #666; } .controls { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin: 16px 0; } .ctrl { background: #f8fafc; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; } .ctrl label { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ctrl input[type=range] { width: calc(100% - 40px); } .ctrl span { float: right; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; } .actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin: 12px 0; } button { padding: 8px 20px; background: #2563eb; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; } button:disabled { opacity: 0.5; } .btn-gray { background: #e5e7eb; color: #333; } #status { font-size: 12px; color: #666; } .log { font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px; max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; margin-top: 12px; } #preview { margin: 12px 0; }
